ModMetaData.name: yc's Faction Editor(forked version)
ModMetaData.author: yancy
ModMetaData.description:
yc的派系编辑器 （forked版本）, be notice that this mod is a forked version of yc's faction editor, and it may not be updated in time with the original mod, but it will try to keep up with the original mod as much as possible. if you want to use the original mod, please go to the steam workshop and search for "yc's faction editor".
this mod is only for pull request and bug fix, if you want to contribute to the original mod, please go to the original mod's github page and submit a pull request.
